calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No apperance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR# 9129. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2005 Continued To Mar-30-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
